Options:

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import time, subprocess, json
cmds = [
  ['bun','test','scripts/verify-m065-s02.test.ts'],
  ['bun','test','scripts/verify-m065-s02.test.ts','--filter','invalid arg'],
  ['bun','run','verify:m065:s02','--','--help'],
]
for cmd in cmds:
    start = time.time()
    proc = subprocess.run(cmd, capture_output=True, text=True)
    dur = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
    print(json.dumps({"command":" ".join(cmd),"exitCode":proc.returncode,"durationMs":dur}))
PY
